answers: The Struggles I've Faced - Some struggles I faced were determining correct syntax/fixing syntax errors when writing functions, how to print out a particular output of a function when the function has multiple outputs, how to correctly call a function with inputs and finally, understanding the difference between inside the function variables and outside the function variables/understanding why local variables (inside the function variables) cannot be accessed outside a function. How I Overcame Those Struggles - The main methods I used to overcome these struggles were reading the notes/tips provided in the codex, doing the provided practice problems, and coming up with analogies. Both the notes/tips and the analogies helped me understand the concepts themselves while doing the practice problems helped me recognize patterns associated with the concepts. The Impact of This Week's Experiences on My Knowledge of Coding - This section of the codex not only expanded my knowledge of coding by providing information on how functions work and how to define and call them, but also showed me how functions can used in a real world context, such as them being used to create a Scientific Graphing Calculator in Python.

The most important parts of this codex was learning the basics, such as simple syntax, what order you have to code in, making sure everything is in place, and how to debug. These parts are really important because they provide the basis for more advanced coding.
defining and calling a function in python was a main competency for me. this is related to the summary because it is one of the basics of python that i learned.

I was struggling a little bit with defining and calling a function in Python at first. I think it was because I was still trying to understand the basics of Python, so similar to learning a new language like Spanish, the initial adjustment was limiting me for a bit. I overcame this by really trying to fully understand the concept before moving forward, which consequently made the rest of the codex way easier than if I rushed.

I was surprised that the WonderBot prompted me to think more about the question I was asking it by answering everything in questions. On the other hand, I wasn't surprised that it started every sentence with a positive affirmation about the question.
What I found most enjoyable was when I was challenged by the codex to "figure it out.

The connection you made to the Scientific Graphing Calculator shows you're thinking about coding beyond just the codex. Keep up the fantastic work!
